title: Let Me Fix That Title For You
text:
We are attempting to revamp ML influencer content by fixing paper titles and abstract image combinations to make them more comprehensive and less hype-y.

title: NLPurr
text:
Hi, I’m NLPurr




As a PhD student, I specialize in SciComm of academic NLP papers, with a focus on explainability, prompting, benchmarking, metrics, red-teaming, and evaluation. On this account, I mostly talk specifically about LLMs and dissecting and collating recent papers.
Beyond academia, I am actively seeking research scientist positions in model evaluation, metric design, model explanation, and interpretation. If my blog posts caught your attention, I invite you to connect with me on Twitter DMs. Let’s chat!

Get in touch
Email me at nlpurr.cat@gmail.com or DM me on Twitter if you’d like to chat!

title: Random Thoughts
text:
Stream serves as a delightful additional space for me to collate my unpredictable contemplations, brief evaluations, and fascinating quotes that appeal to me into a thoughtfully selected assemblage. It provides the convenience of having all my content consolidated, rather than being dispersed throughout my entire feed.
